current_status_update.text:
Summary
The plan is to find a window where we might be able to squeeze this in between other priorities in 2025. So, we'll mark this as on hold, but I'd like to periodically revisit this https://app.asana.com/0/profile/1204109365157503, to see if we can find a window to maybe crank out a v1 of the registration app architecture AWS requires.

Next steps

current_status_update.text:
Summary
Initial investigation focused on a potential data leak related to the use of the Form.io Scala proxy. We believed this might affect both form templates and submission data. However, after further review, we confirmed that the issue is limited to metadata within the form templates only — no sensitive or submission data is exposed.

With this clarification, we’ve downgraded the risk to low and decided no immediate action is required at this time.

Next steps
current_status_update.title: API Endpoint Security Cleanup - Formio Proxy - Jul 9
current_status_update.html_text: Summary Initial investigation focused on a potential data leak related to the use of the Form.io Scala proxy. We believed this might affect both form templates and submission data. However, after further review, we confirmed that the issue is limited to metadata within the form templates only — no sensitive or submission data is exposed. With this clarification, we’ve downgraded the risk to low and decided no immediate action is required at this time. Next steps

name: API Endpoint Security Cleanup - Formio Proxy

current_status_update.text:
Summary
Placing this as on hold for a Reporting initiative - it sounds like we don't need to upgrade the client versions as they likely won't work with spring boot. The most we would need here would be to upgrade the Kafka Broker which is DevOps work. I recommend closing this initiative and spinning up a new one for DevOps.

Next steps

current_status_update.text:
Summary

Leaving as on track because it only moved 1 release. QA completed half of their test cases and found enough bugs that I was worried we wouldn't be able to rework, retest, and be ready for release. So I deprioritized this work in favor of UoW linking and WF Triggers because they are lighter testing efforts and have a better chance of getting out the door. That allows us time to complete this for the next release. 

----------------------------------------

Next steps
